requirement_topic.en: CRE/CFE Grid Connection — Service, Metering and Power Quality
requirement_topic.zh: CRE/CFE 电网接入——供电、计量和电能质量
requirement_topic.zht: CRE/CFE 電網接入——供電、計量和電能品質

summary.en: EV charger deployment in Mexico must fit local distribution service, metering, installation approval, and power-quality expectations. CFE is the key utility interface for distribution service and energization, while CRE grid-code and electricity-sector rules may affect larger loads, interconnection studies, power factor, harmonics, demand management, and user obligations. Under the CRE DACG published in April 2026, covered medium-voltage and high-voltage load centers should plan for a minimum power factor of 0.97 rather than the prior 0.95 threshold. NOM-001-SEDE remains the installation safety baseline. IEC/EN installation references can support design, but CFE/CRE requirements control local acceptance.
summary.zh: 在墨西哥部署充电桩须符合当地配电供电、计量、安装批准和电能质量预期。CFE 是配电供电和送电的关键接口；CRE 电网规范及电力行业规则可能影响较大负荷、接入研究、功率因数、谐波、需求管理和用户义务。根据 CRE 于 2026 年 4 月发布的 DACG，受覆盖的中压和高压负荷中心应按最低功率因数 0.97 规划，而不是此前的 0.95 阈值。NOM-001-SEDE 仍是安装安全基线。IEC/EN 安装参考可支持设计，但本地验收以 CFE/CRE 要求为准。
summary.zht: 在墨西哥部署充電樁須符合當地配電供電、計量、安裝批准和電能品質預期。CFE 是配電供電和送電的關鍵接口；CRE 電網規範及電力行業規則可能影響較大負荷、接入研究、功率因數、諧波、需求管理和用戶義務。根據 CRE 於 2026 年 4 月發布的 DACG，受覆蓋的中壓和高壓負荷中心應按最低功率因數 0.97 規劃，而不是此前的 0.95 閾值。NOM-001-SEDE 仍是安裝安全基線。IEC/EN 安裝參考可支持設計，但本地驗收以 CFE/CRE 要求為準。

standards_or_laws: CRE Codigo de Red requirements where applicable, including April 2026 DACG minimum power factor 0.97 for covered MV/HV load centers
CFE distribution service and metering requirements

summary.en: Chinese charger deployments may be designed around State Grid or China Southern Power Grid connection practices, Chinese voltage/frequency conventions, and local Chinese power-quality expectations. Those assumptions do not automatically match CFE distribution service categories or CRE grid-code expectations.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩部署可能围绕国家电网或南方电网接入实践、中国电压/频率惯例及本地电能质量预期设计。这些假设不会自动匹配 CFE 配电供电类别或 CRE 电网规范预期。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁部署可能圍繞國家電網或南方電網接入實務、中國電壓/頻率慣例及本地電能品質預期設計。這些假設不會自動匹配 CFE 配電供電類別或 CRE 電網規範預期。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station
GB/T 51313 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure

gap.en: Mexico projects should confirm service voltage, phase configuration, demand capacity, transformer/loading impacts, metering, grounding system, surge protection, harmonics, power factor correction sized for the 0.97 MV/HV threshold where applicable, and any CRE grid-code obligations before import quantities are committed. The product file should include Spanish electrical single-line guidance and installation ratings that a Mexican engineer can use for CFE service requests.
gap.zh: 墨西哥项目应在确定进口数量前确认供电电压、相制、需量容量、变压器/负载影响、计量、接地系统、浪涌保护、谐波、按适用的中压/高压 0.97 阈值配置的功率因数校正，以及任何 CRE 电网规范义务。产品文件应包含西班牙语电气单线图指引和安装额定值，便于墨西哥工程师用于 CFE 供电申请。
gap.zht: 墨西哥項目應在確定進口數量前確認供電電壓、相制、需量容量、變壓器/負載影響、計量、接地系統、突波保護、諧波、按適用的中壓/高壓 0.97 閾值配置的功率因數校正，以及任何 CRE 電網規範義務。產品文件應包含西班牙語電氣單線圖指引和安裝額定值，便於墨西哥工程師用於 CFE 供電申請。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for installation and energization where applicable: CFE service rules, CRE grid-code obligations for covered users, the CRE April 2026 DACG minimum power factor of 0.97 for covered MV/HV load centers, and NOM-001-SEDE electrical installation requirements must be satisfied locally.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection documents are not substitutes for CFE service approval or CRE grid-code analysis

source.publisher: Gobierno de Mexico / Comision Reguladora de Energia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CFE/CRE readiness is a site and utility interface issue. A charger can have a NOM product certificate and still fail deployment if service capacity, metering, grounding, harmonics, or grid-code obligations are not addressed.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】CFE/CRE 准备情况属于场站和公用事业接口问题。充电桩即使取得 NOM 产品证书，如果未处理供电容量、计量、接地、谐波或电网规范义务，仍可能无法部署。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】CFE/CRE 準備情況屬於場站和公用事業接口問題。充電樁即使取得 NOM 產品證書，如果未處理供電容量、計量、接地、諧波或電網規範義務，仍可能無法部署。
